hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Block 2 Capstone: A Full Day at Work
lesson.menu_desc: Bring it all together -- requests, plans, help, comparisons, follow-up -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 20 -- Block 2 Capstone: A Full Day at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 20 -- Block 2 Capstone: A Full Day at Work

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I want to plan our week on the big order. First, could you set up a call with the supplier for Thursday? We are going to confirm the price then. The Andino supplier is cheaper than the other one, so I think we should choose them. Second, can you help the new colleague with the report? He has a problem with the file. About the progress: we have already sent the contract, and the client has signed it, but the deposit has not arrived yet. We are a little behind schedule, but I think we are still on track. Please call me back and tell me what is complete. Thank you.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Here is my update on the order. I have already set up the call with the supplier for Thursday, so we can confirm the price then. I compared the two suppliers: the Andino one is cheaper and faster, so I agree we should choose them. I have helped the new colleague with the report, and now he can open the file. The good news is the client has just sent the deposit, so that part is complete. We were behind schedule, but now we are back on track for the deadline. Please send me the agenda, and I will call you tomorrow. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: Let me plan the week. Could you set up a call with the supplier? We are going to confirm the price on Thursday. Can you help the new colleague? The Andino supplier is cheaper, so we should choose them. We have already sent the contract, but the deposit has not arrived yet. We are still on track for the deadline.
